project_title: Port of Calais Extension and Sea Defence

measures.name: Port extension
measures.description: A port extension designed to accommodate more and larger ships while protecting the port from rising sea level and storm surges.

measures.name: Sea defence
measures.description: A new 3.3 km-long seawall and 100-hectare port basin, dug to accommodate larger ships.

project_title: Prince Edward Island

measures.name: Intertidal reefs
measures.description: Dune restoration and shoreline stabilisation works, including the creation of two intertidal reefs.

project_title: Copenhagen Metro

measures.name: Waterproof tunnel designs
measures.description: Installations of waterproof outer doors and waterproof walls in stations, equipment rooms and electrical and mechanical installations.

measures.name: Improved drainage
measures.description: Drains, drainage gates and water pumping systems.

project_title: New locks in the Albert Canal

measures.name: Archimedes screws installed in pumping
measures.description: Archimedes screws pump water back up the canal lost during ship lockage, maintaining water levels during droughts.

measures.name: Hydroelectric power stations
measures.description: Archimedes screws generate renewable energy in times of high water levels, mainly in winter.

project_title: Austrian Federal Railways Climate Adaptation Measures

measures.name: Slope stabilisation
measures.description: Slope stabilisation to mitigate landslide and rockfall risks.

measures.name: Rockfall barriers
measures.description: Rockfall barriers to mitigate landslide and rockfall risks.

measures.name: Flood defences
measures.description: Installation of flood retention basins to manage water runoff.

measures.name: Drainage systems
measures.description: Installation of improved drainage systems to manage water runoff.

measures.name: Early warning systems
measures.description: Geotechnical sensors and weather forecasting tools to predict hazards and allow timely interventions.

measures.name: Real-time monitoring
measures.description: Real-time monitoring technologies such as geotechnical sensors.

project_title: MTA Saint George Terminal

measures.name: Installation of flood protection devices
measures.description: Flex gates, marine doors, and over 3,000 flood barriers at subway stations.

measures.name: Rehabilitation of under-river tunnels
measures.description: Under-river tunnel rehabilitation and flood walls around key areas.

measures.name: Elevating of critical equipment
measures.description: New signal room elevated 12 feet above ground; flood walls spanning 1,111 feet.

project_title: CIPA Port Wharf Climate Proofing

measures.name: Wharf height increase
measures.description: Raising the main berth by 0.5 metres to adapt to rising sea levels.

measures.name: Rock armour
measures.description: Rock armour to extend the western breakwater by 92m, protecting from erosion and storm surges.

project_title: Infrabel Climate Adaptation Measures

measures.name: Tension release devices
measures.description: Devices to prevent rail tracks from buckling during high temperatures or fracturing during low temperatures.

measures.name: Storm basins
measures.description: Storm basins to mitigate potential flooding in flood-prone areas.

project_title: Deutsche Bahn Climate Adaptation Measures

measures.name: Air-conditioned trains
measures.description: ICE 4 long-distance trains with air-conditioning capable of coping with external temperatures up to 45°C.

measures.name: Vegetation management
measures.description: Investment in vegetation management to mitigate the impacts of storms and falling trees.

measures.name: Environmental sensors
measures.description: IoT sensor technology monitoring ambient temperature, particle load and humidity.

project_title: Leeds Flood Alleviation Scheme

measures.name: Natural Flood Management
measures.description: Over 500,000 trees planted and 500 hectares of soil management at catchment scale.

measures.name: Traditional engineering approaches
measures.description: Flood walls, moveable weirs, embankments and 1.8 million m3 floodwater storage at Calverley.

project_title: TfL Marylebone Flyover Sustainable Drainage Systems

measures.name: Sustainable Drainage Systems
measures.description: Over 3,500m2 of rainwater collection space with nine rain gardens at the A5/Marylebone flyover intersection.

project_title: Adelaide Airport Irrigation Project

measures.name: Irrigation
measures.description: Trial of land irrigation to locally reduce high air temperatures around the airport.

project_title: Environment Agency Clays Lake Scheme

measures.name: Flood storage reservoirs (dams)
measures.description: Four flood storage reservoirs providing 1 in 50 year flood protection; Clays Lake dam replacement increases capacity from 10,000 to 400,000 cubic metres.

project_title: Network Rail Conwy Valley Line Washout

measures.name: Earthworks
measures.description: 16,000 tonnes of rock armour reinforcing over a mile of embankment, plus six culverts installed.

project_title: City of Phoenix Street Transportation Department Cool Pavements Programme

measures.name: Cool pavement technology
measures.description: CoolSeal reflective coating applied to 100+ miles of roads, reducing heat storage compared to asphalt.

project_title: Pound Road West Upgrade Dandenong South

measures.name: Glass fibre reinforcement for concrete
measures.description: GFRP rebar used in lieu of steel to improve resilience to corrosion and climate change impacts.

project_title: Government of South Australia - Fire Suppression Systems

measures.name: Ventilation systems
measures.description: 23 new exhaust fans and automated fire suppression system in tunnels for wildfire safety.

project_title: City of Parramatta Cool Roads Trial Project

measures.name: Cool pavement technology
measures.description: CoolSeal applied to 14,700m2 of road and carpark surfaces across 12 sites in Western Sydney.

project_title: LA Metro Climate Adaptation Plan

measures.name: Hardening / protecting infrastructure
measures.description: Engineering solutions including raising rail segments in flood zones and natural infrastructure for cooling.

measures.name: Adjusting operations / changing behaviours
measures.description: Rerouting buses during flooding and wildfires; blue water detours for flooded routes.

measures.name: Relocating existing infrastructure or designing new infrastructure
measures.description: Rory M. Shaw Wetlands Park on former landfill to address flood risk and stormwater pollution.

project_title: Resilient Florida Program (Dania Beach)

measures.name: Drainage systems
measures.description: New stormwater pipes, catch basins, earthworks and resilient roadway design to combat coastal flooding.

project_title: Qatar's Public Works Authority - Pumping Station and Outfall Tunnel

measures.name: Pumping station and outfall tunnel
measures.description: 19.7m3/s pumping station and 10km undersea outfall tunnel to discharge stormwater and groundwater.

project_title: Climate Resilient Transport for Sydney Metro Rail System

measures.name: Ventilation systems
measures.description: Tunnel axial fans and 17 compressed air systems to ensure passenger comfort during heat waves.

project_title: Bradford Metropolitan Council - Trees and Stormwater Attenuation & Treatment Pits

measures.name: Trees as stormwater attenuation and treatment pits
measures.description: Six Field Maples with ArborFlow tree pits providing 30.81m3 storage capacity for 1 in 30-year storm events.

project_title: Network Rail Drainage System

measures.name: Enhanced maintenance
measures.description: Increased maintenance of vulnerable track locations and OLE systems to combat flooding impacts.

measures.name: Drainage renewal and refurbishment
measures.description: 600,000+ metres of track drainage network rebuilt by 2029; 900+ miles under planned maintenance.

measures.name: Remote condition monitoring
measures.description: Smart movement sensors and CCTV at high-risk locations for proactive asset management.

measures.name: Slope stabilisation
measures.description: Reinforcement of embankments and erosion control measures to reduce landslip risks.

project_title: Heathrow Airport Balancing Pond

measures.name: Balancing ponds
measures.description: Ponds with tilting weirs, sheet pile walls, gabions and MBBR treatment to manage both drought and heavy rainfall.

project_title: Heathrow Airport Climate-resilient Grass

measures.name: Climate-resilient grass
measures.description: Rhizomatous tall fescue and tetraploid perennial ryegrass with deeper roots for drought resilience.

project_title: Caltrans Gleason Beach Road Realignment Project

measures.name: Relocation of road
measures.description: Half-mile section of SR 1 relocated 400 feet inland to avoid eroding cliff.

measures.name: Bridge construction
measures.description: 850-foot bridge over Scotty Creek floodplain replacing existing culvert.

measures.name: Habitat restoration
measures.description: Culvert removal restoring natural hydrological flow and fish migration at Scotty Creek.

project_title: The Panama Canal Authority Strategic Measures for Water Saving

measures.name: Fresh water surcharge
measures.description: Variable fee component designed to preserve water levels in Gatun Lake.

measures.name: Water-savings basins in locks
measures.description: Basins recycling up to 60% of water used per transit in Neopanamax Locks.

measures.name: Cross-filling in locks
measures.description: Transferring water between Panamax Lock chambers to reduce freshwater needed per transit.

measures.name: Restrictions on draft and daily transits
measures.description: Vessel draft restrictions and transit limits saving 1.2 million m3 of water daily.

measures.name: Minimising direction changes at locks
measures.description: Reducing direction changes at Gatun Locks to conserve water.

measures.name: Controlling and eliminating water leaks
measures.description: Addressing leaks and suspending special lockages to reduce water loss.

measures.name: Suspending special lockages and hydraulic assistance
measures.description: Suspension of out-of-schedule transits to conserve water.

measures.name: Minimising electricity generation
measures.description: Reducing hydroelectric generation to preserve Gatun Lake water levels.

measures.name: Water optimisation measures
measures.description: Integrated measures tied to Gatun Dam to optimise water usage across canal operations.

project_title: Thames Water Counters Creek Sustainable Drainage Systems

measures.name: Sustainable Drainage System (SuDS)
measures.description: Permeable paving, geocellular storage, rain gardens and tree pits reducing surface water run-off.

project_title: Sheffield City Council Grey to Green

measures.name: Sustainable Drainage System (SuDS)
measures.description: 1.5km continuous green infrastructure, rain gardens and public art; 60% of grey surfacing converted to green.

project_title: Santa Barbara County Montecito's Randall Road Debris Basin

measures.name: Debris basin
measures.description: Six-acre artificially landscaped depression capturing debris during heavy rainfall events.

project_title: Network Rail Dawlish Sea Wall

measures.name: Sea wall
measures.description: New 8-metre sea wall with recurve top along 815m protecting the Exeter to Newton Abbot railway.

project_title: TfL Rainwater Harvesting

measures.name: Rainwater harvesting
measures.description: Underground rainwater storage integrated into depot design; 23,000m3 recycled water used in 2023-24.

project_title: Environment Agency Thames Tidal Barrier

measures.name: Tidal barriers
measures.description: Thames Barrier spanning 520 metres protecting 116 rail/tube stations, 300km of roads and 1.5 million people.

project_title: Berlin BVG Green Tram Tracks

measures.name: Green tramways
measures.description: 22,000+ metres of sedum or grass-planted tram tracks mitigating heat, storms and heavy rainfall.

project_title: Department of Transport and Main Roads (Queensland)

measures.name: Foamed bitumen stabilisation
measures.description: Foam-bitumen stabilisation of Camp Cable Road and Stegemann Road for enhanced flood resilience.
